calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine The Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine The Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Aug-26-2008 Continued To Sep-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martha Daetwyler for and with Tina Perricone (Successor Trustee). Jocelyn Cohen in Propria Persona. Joanne Genet in Propria Persona.

Ms. Daetwyler stated that there was no challenge as to the handwriting or the validity of the trust. Ms. Cohen stated that she wanted to oppose the handwriting and stated that it was done without a witness. She also stated that she signed the waiver based on a written agreement she made with Mr. Menzel (Former Attorney) that 3.34% interest of the 29th street property would go to her. The Court continued the matter to September 16, 2008 and advised Ms. Cohen to seek counsel.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR#7782. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition To Determine The Validity Of Trust Provision
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Continued To Aug-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
